label: Stat part (quality offset)
description: Adds a flat offset to the stat based on the item's quality tier. Optionally restricted to specific ThingDefs.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

offsetAwful.label: Offset (awful)
offsetAwful.description: Stat offset added for awful quality items.

offsetPoor.label: Offset (poor)
offsetPoor.description: Stat offset added for poor quality items.

offsetNormal.label: Offset (normal)
offsetNormal.description: Stat offset added for normal quality items.

offsetGood.label: Offset (good)
offsetGood.description: Stat offset added for good quality items.

offsetExcellent.label: Offset (excellent)
offsetExcellent.description: Stat offset added for excellent quality items.

offsetMasterwork.label: Offset (masterwork)
offsetMasterwork.description: Stat offset added for masterwork quality items.

offsetLegendary.label: Offset (legendary)
offsetLegendary.description: Stat offset added for legendary quality items.

thingDefs.label: Thing defs
thingDefs.description: If non-empty, this part only applies when the stat request is for one of these ThingDefs.
